calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-14-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: R. Edwards/ M. Chin, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Petitioner: Edwin Gordon Toy, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: JORDAN TOY.

Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-30-2004 Reset To Dec-14-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.

Petitioner: Edwin Gordon Toy, present in pro per was sworn and examined.

The Court advised the petitioner that because there is no proof of publication on file, the matter will be taken off today's calendar and continued to December 14, 2004. Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/ R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-09-2004 Off Calendar
